title: Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
company: Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions:
Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Hotel Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ananda in the Himalayas Ventures Solutions!
